channel.title: General (new posts)
channel.description: Posts in the forum category "General" - General Discussion

item.title: SCP Cosplay suggestions: Re: SCP Cosplay suggestions
item.content:encoded: Hmm… Good suggestions I will look into 049-j Thank you!

item.title: SCP Cosplay suggestions: Re: SCP Cosplay suggestions
item.content:encoded:
Well, SCP-049 is the obvious choice. Relatively simple: robe, gloves, mask, optional pimp stick. 049-j is similar.

You could paint some scary tattoos on yourself, grab a sword, and say you’re 076.

2331 could work, though it’s specifically Halloween related so that might be too on the nose.

Most other humanoids to my knowledge would be difficult to pull off, since they either look completely human or not human enough to cosplay without prosthetics or something.

item.title: SCP Cosplay suggestions: SCP Cosplay suggestions
item.content:encoded:
So in my country there is no Halloween but a holiday later in the year called Yom Kipur (יום כיפור)
and at that holiday you dress up as anything you want and generally celebrate in school, work, parties etc… So for this year i wanted to cosplay as a humanoid SCP of course but I don't know which one. Send me suggestions and I will pick the most interesting ones. Thanks!

item.title: What is the most absolutely disgusting, stomach churning SCP you've read?: Re: What is the most absolutely disgusting, stomach churning SCP you've read?
item.content:encoded: SCP-3240. Also SCP-2825 and any other SCP with a Perhacs family member in it.

item.title: Story’s about GOC: Re: Story’s about GOC
item.content:encoded:
Howdy!

Try this tag search, http://scp-wiki.wikidot.com/system:page-tags/tag/global-occult-coalition#pages It has everything GOC related.

item.title: Story’s about GOC: Story’s about GOC
item.content:encoded: I really like the concept of the GOC but I can’t seem to find a lot of good stories involving them. Know any?

item.title: What is your favourite SCP?: Re: What is your favourite SCP?
item.content:encoded: Same!

item.title: Summary: What Remarkable Achievements You've Made in 2020?: Re: Summary: What Remarkable Achievements You've Made in 2020?
item.content:encoded: Gave a (virtual) presentation on some of my research at a conference. More importantly, got a bunch of questions that I was able to answer in a way that made me sound like I knew what I was talking about.

item.title: Summary: What Remarkable Achievements You've Made in 2020?: Re: Summary: What Remarkable Achievements You've Made in 2020?
item.content:encoded: Completed my PhD and my first year as full-time faculty. Got one publication.

item.title: Help: Re: Help
item.content:encoded:
I suppose it is technically a different wiki, but I have no way of knowing.

The sandbox is a different wiki. You can tell by the "member of" section of your wikidot profile; membership to the mainsite and membership to the sandbox are listed separately.

item.title: Help: Re: Help
item.content:encoded: If you were trying to make a sandbox page, the fix is pretty simple. I ran into the same problem myself, in fact. All you have to do is go to the sandbox and find the tab where you can join the site. I suppose it is technically a different wiki, but I have no way of knowing. Hope you can get it working!

item.title: Contact Gears: Re: Contact Gears
item.content:encoded: Literally want to get in on some of that, so count me in on your server!

item.title: weird question about the website: Re: weird question about the website
item.content:encoded:
We do have a dark mode usertool listed here: http://www.scpwiki.com/usertools but I'm not completely certain if it still works.

Also, since it looks like you're posting a lot in the forums lately, remember that the search bar is your friend:

  • http://www.scpwiki.com/forum/t-13705014
  • http://www.scpwiki.com/forum/t-994454
  • http://www.scpwiki.com/forum/t-7212456

item.title: weird question about the website: weird question about the website
item.content:encoded: is there any way to turn on a dark mode for the website?

item.title: Help: Re: Help
item.content:encoded: try signing in using the wikidot version instead of scpwiki.com

item.title: How Did You Find the Foundation?: Re: How Did You Find the Foundation?
item.content:encoded: jacksepticeye made a video playing containment breach and now i'm the biggest SCP nerd ever

item.title: What are your two favorite articles on the SCP wiki?: Re: What are your two favorite articles on the SCP wiki?
item.content:encoded: SCP-999 and SCP-173-j

item.title: what would make something a -j: Re: what would make something a -j
item.content:encoded:
i see -j in some SCPs what does it mean?

The -J suffix denotes joke articles. The list of Joke SCPs is here: http://scp-wiki.wikidot.com/joke-scps

item.title: what would make something a -j: what would make something a -j
item.content:encoded: i see -j in some SCPs what does it mean? is it just a name like SCP-xxxx-2 or is it something else?

item.title: What are your two favorite articles on the SCP wiki?: Re: What are your two favorite articles on the SCP wiki?
item.content:encoded: SCP-2747 is my number one pick for the best SCP article on the entire site, and SCP-261 is my number one favorite Series 1.
